evals.prompt: Add a new support agent with tools for search and memory
evals.expected_output: Auto-invoked application of agent frontmatter and body conventions when editing agent files.
assertions: Agent auto-invokes when primary file is under agents/ or *.md agent definition.

evals.expected_output: Compliance-only response validating frontmatter, indexes, and naming.
Summary of conventions and required update of README index.
assertions: Reminds to update agents/README.md index on add/modify.

evals.prompt: Create a new skill for foo using the conventions
evals.expected_output: Negative control: agent-conventions does not apply to SKILL.md; routes to skill authoring surfaces.
assertions: Agent does not apply agent frontmatter rules to skills.
May reference skill-creator or AGENTS.md for skills.

evals.prompt: I added agents/new-thing.md; make sure the index is current
evals.expected_output: Requires or performs update to the README.md index per conventions.
assertions: Agent enforces: Always update the README.md index when adding or modifying an agent.
Uses imperative voice in agent bodies.
